name: Cucina! Cucina! Chopped Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 oz garbanzo beans, cooked, lightly chopped
1 head lettuce, cut into 1/4 inch pieces
1 cup mozzarella cheese, part skim milk, grated
12 oz chicken breasts without skin, poached and sliced
8 oz plum tomatoes, diced, reserve 1/2 for garnish
1/2 cup provolone cheese, grated, 1/2 for garnish
3 stalks green onions, sliced, 1/2 for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the garbanzo beans, lettuce, basil, mozzarella, chicken, salami, half of the tomatoes, half of the provolone cheese, and half of the green onions in a large bowl.
2. Toss with the Italian Vinaigrette until evenly coated.
3. Divide the salad mixture evenly between 8 lettuce-lined plates.
4. Garnish each plate with the remaining tomatoes, provolone cheese, and green onions.
